recommendations.title: Step Up All In
recommendations.overview: All-stars from previous installments convene in glittering Las Vegas, battling for a victory that could define their dreams and their careers.

recommendations.title: Players
recommendations.overview: New York sportswriter Mack has spent years devising successful hook-up "plays" with her friends, but when she unexpectedly falls for one of her targets, she must learn what it takes to go from simply scoring to playing for keeps.

recommendations.title: Pitch Perfect 3

recommendations.title: Sitting in Bars with Cake
recommendations.overview: Extrovert Corinne convinces Jane, a shy, talented baker, to commit to a year of bringing cakes to bars, to help her meet people and build confidence. But when Corinne receives a life-altering diagnosis, the pair faces a challenge unlike anything they

recommendations.title: Tangled
recommendations.overview: Feisty teenager Rapunzel, who has long and magical hair, wants to go and see sky lanterns on her eighteenth birthday, but she's bound to a tower by her overprotective mother. She strikes a deal with Flynn Rider, a charming wanted thief, and the duo s

recommendations.title: My Brother, My Sister
recommendations.overview: When their father's will forces them to live together, siblings Nik and Tesla — and Tesla's kids — try to overcome their differences to become a family.

recommendations.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
recommendations.overview: When single mom Callie and her two kids Trevor and Phoebe arrive in a small Oklahoma town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

recommendations.title: The Forge
recommendations.overview: 19 year old Isaiah Wright lives for basketball and video games. A year out of high school, he has no job, no plans, and no idea how to be a man. At odds with his single mother Cynthia, Isaiah is given an ultimatum – to step up or move out. Feeling th

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: Hi, Mom
